title: Temperature conversion contract
prompt: Fix convert_temperature so C, F, and K conversions are correct. Keep the signature unchanged and reject unknown units with ValueError.
hidden_tests_description: Kelvin conversion, same-unit conversion, and invalid units are checked.
public_api_contract: convert_temperature(value: float, from_unit: str, to_unit: str) -> float
h0_risk_notes: Baseline should often match on this easy task.
